name: Corned Beef with Onions and Greens
recipeIngredient: 4 large Onions, sliced and in rings
1 bunch Mustard greens or collard greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Rinse corned beef under cold water to remove spices; pat dry.
3. In a 6-quart Dutch oven, heat oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add corned beef, fat side down, and cook, turning once, until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes. Remove to a cutting board and carve into 1/2-inch slices.
5. In the same pot, cook onions over medium heat, stirring occasionally until golden, about 3-5 minutes.
6. Add broth, beer, garlic, and pepper to the pot.
7. Layer corned beef slices and potato slices in the onion/broth mixture.
8. Cover and bake for 2.5 hours.
9. Add greens to the pot; cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Cooking time: 3 hours
Serves: 6 to 8
